name: Mesmer
description: Psionic adepts who manipulate reality through illusion, perception, and mental resonance. They excel at battlefield control, deception, and support through subtle influence and mirror constructs. Half-caster. Paths are the Spectre and the Weaver.
favored_attributes_note: Source: 'Mind or Will' — player picks one as Spellcasting Modifier.

resources.name: Reservoir
resources.note: Half-caster reservoir; source = Anima, modifier = Mind or Will.

resources.name: Tethers
resources.note: Number of active psionic Tethers; granted by the Tethers feat.

feats.name: Tethers
feats.description: Anchor your mind to others through psionic Tethers. Choose one Tether Aspect (key: tether_aspect). You may form Tethers equal to your Tier. If the target is unwilling, make a spell attack to connect the tether.

grants.description: A tethered enemy attacking anyone other than you suffers -1d4 to the attack roll.
Deal +1d4 Psychic damage against a tethered target affected by a Phantasm or Cord.
Tethered allies gain +1 + Tier to one Attribute Defense of your choice.
Once per round, when you or a tethered creature is attacked, impose Strain on one attack.

feats.name: Mindweave
feats.description: Link to a willing target within Nearby range, or an enemy you can see within Close range on a successful Mind check using your Spellcasting Modifier. While linked, you faintly sense emotions and surface thoughts. The link fades after 1 minute or if broken by damage equal to Tier × 5.

feats.name: Spellcasting
feats.description: Half-caster; source is Anima; modifier is Mind or Will. Reservoir = (1 × Tier) + Modifier. Start with three known tier 1 spells. Prepared spells = Modifier. Spell DC = 10 + Spell Tier + Modifier. Respite restores Modifier reservoir (minimum 3). You do not gain standard cantrips; instead choose two Cords, treated as spells for casting and spell-attack purposes. Cords can be amplified ('Stitched') with Ambition.

options.name: Kinesis
options.description: Lift loose objects up to 5 lbs and move them within range.

options.name: Render
options.description: Spell attack vs Armor; on hit deal 1d6 Fire or Slash + Spellcasting Modifier.

stitch.effect: increase damage die one step per thread spent (d4>d6>d8>d10>d12)

options.name: Eviscerate
options.description: Attack vs Mental; on hit deal 2d4 Psychic.

stitch.effect: add threads modifier to damage; on crit target is Dazed

options.name: Mirage
options.description: Until your next turn you count as half-covered and cannot be targeted by reflex strikes.

stitch.effect: extend to an ally within Close; ends early if either attacks

options.name: Nullify
options.description: Spell attack vs Will Defense; on hit deal 1d8 Psychic + Spellcasting Modifier.

stitch.effect: on hit target loses 1 AP or takes +1d4 Psychic

boons.note: Cords replace cantrips; Stitch = Ambition amplification. See rule-check.md.

feats.name: Musing Spark
feats.description: Give a creature within range a Spark. A creature with a Spark may add Tier + your Ambition die to one skill check, attack roll, or spell attack. Only one Spark may be held at a time; it lasts until used or the creature finishes a Respite, then fades. Grant a number of Sparks per day equal to Tier × 2.

feats.name: Deepen Aspects
feats.description: Strengthen your Tethers, gaining an enhanced feature based on your chosen Aspect: Aberration — the attack-roll penalty increases to 1d6, and you may spend 1 Reservoir to add your Tier to the penalty; Authority — the bonus Psychic damage becomes +1d4, plus an additional 1d4 per Tier, against a tethered target; Solace — once per minute, tethered allies roll skill and spell checks with Resolve; Vestige — when a tethered creature misses via the Strain you imposed, it takes 1d6 Psychic damage.

aberration.note: Spend 1 Reservoir to add Tier to the penalty.
